signature.value:
Vcause this project doesn’t currently have Container or ButtonLink, I adapted the slice to the existing stack by using Bounded and a styled PrismicNextLink. I also synced the NoteBanner type shape in church-website/prismicio-types.d.ts so the slice fields are typed correctly.
Verification: npm run lint passes. The only output was a non-blocking baseline-browser-mapping staleness warning from a dependency.
